label: Signal processing & harmonic analysis

node.label: Signal processing & harmonic analysis
node.definition: Sampling, filtering, spectra, Fourier analysis, and wavelets characterize structured signals across time and space.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Signal processing & harmonic analysis is to connect Linear algebra, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory to downstream capabilities including Neuroscience & cognitive science, Sequences, events & time series, Images, video & spatial grids.
examples: substrate for Sequences, events & time series
substrate for Images, video & spatial grids
limitations: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Calculus & automatic differentiation theory.

dependencies.rationale: Signal processing & harmonic analysis rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Linear algebra.
Signal processing & harmonic analysis rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Calculus & automatic differentiation theory.
Signal processing & harmonic analysis rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Probability theory.

sentence_units.text: Sampling, filtering, spectra, Fourier analysis, and wavelets characterize structured signals across time and space.
